hero.sheet:
- Age: late 20s
- Build: lean, athletic, slightly slouched posture
- Face: angular, defined jawline, high cheekbones
- Skin: warm medium-brown
- Eyes: dark brown, almond-shaped, straight brows
- Nose: narrow bridge, slightly upturned tip
- Mouth: medium-full lips, neutral-serious resting expression
- Hair: black, short, wavy, side-parted, full hairline
- Marks: small scar above left eyebrow
- Carriage: weight forward, ready stance
- Neutral expression: watchful, slight frown

sidekick.sheet:
- Age: mid 30s
- Build: tall, broad shoulders, straight posture
- Face: square, strong jaw
- Skin: fair with pink undertones
- Eyes: green, round, thick straight brows
- Nose: broad bridge, rounded tip
- Mouth: thin lips, wry half-smile at rest
- Hair: ash-blonde, shoulder-length, straight, center-part
- Marks: small silver hoop in right ear
- Carriage: relaxed, hands-in-pockets tendency
- Neutral expression: amused, eyebrow slightly raised

arc.title: The Rooftop Bargain
arc.logline: A rain-soaked detective and her cynical partner corner a fixer who offers a trade neither of them can refuse without losing something irreplaceable.

pages.scene: HERO stands on a neon-lit rooftop in the rain, trench coat flaring, SIDEKICK silhouetted in the background. Skyline of a megacity below, purple and magenta signage reflecting in puddles.

wardrobe.HERO: long black trench coat over grey turtleneck, dark jeans, boots
wardrobe.SIDEKICK: charcoal blazer, white shirt untucked, gunmetal-tipped gloves

pages.scene: HERO examines a bloody coin under the flickering sign of a 24-hour noodle bar. Rain. SIDEKICK leans on the doorway behind, watching the street.
pages.caption: The coin was warm. That was the part that bothered her.
pages.dialogue: This isn't a mugging. Whoever did this wanted it found.

wardrobe.HERO: trench coat, grey turtleneck, dark jeans, boots
wardrobe.SIDEKICK: charcoal blazer, white shirt, gunmetal gloves

pages.scene: HERO and SIDEKICK face a well-dressed FIXER across a rooftop helipad. Wind. FIXER holds out a burner phone in one hand and a file in the other.
pages.caption: He was selling an answer. The only question was which one I could live with after.
pages.dialogue: Name, or the evidence. Not both.

choices.label: Take the name (betray the case to save a friend)
Take the evidence (close the case even if it burns the friend)

wardrobe.HERO: trench coat now damp through, turtleneck
wardrobe.SIDEKICK: blazer collar up against wind, gloves
